title: BallotOption
description: docs/canonical/TZ-00-domain-event-canon.md, section 15.2. Owned by voting-service (epd2_voting_service.domain.BallotOption). Per ADR-009 item 3, abstention is modeled as an ordinary option row (e.g. option_code = 'abstain') - there is no separate abstention field. `status` is this service's own minimal, documented completion of canon's 'options lock once the ballot opens' rule (canon names no explicit status list for this entity).
